title: Workflow edit was auto-allowed instead of pausing for approval
description: A guarded dogfooding run that targeted `.github/workflows/ci.yml` evaluated as `allow` and began editing the workflow even though the expected operator behavior was an approval stop.
reproductionNotes: Run `pnpm gdh run runs/fixtures/dogfood/ci-workflow-comment-cleanup.md --runner codex-cli --approval-mode fail --json` in this repo and inspect the persisted policy decision before the operator interrupts the run.
suspectedCause: Policy matching treated spec-mentioned validation commands as a stronger allow signal than the protected workflow path intent.
